evidence: main advanced 161 commits with zero commits behind
main-only additions include thread-scoped MCP refresh, binding clients, inherited history paging, and rollout-reference protection
latest-alpha-cli advanced 150 commits and is one commit behind its independent baseline lineage
alpha was acquired and classified independently from main

supervisorySessionController.summary: Requalify the current CUEstrap v2 supervisor against expanded hook lifecycle, permission and approval schemas, instruction context, tool routing, MCP refresh, and session identity before claiming compatibility.

idiomaticCueWorkbookHarness.summary: Update workbook MCP, code-mode, structured-result, and context-lifecycle qualification against current app, connector, and runtime projections.

critical.title: Hook ingress expanded beyond CUEstrap's closed boundary
critical.summary: Both channels change hook metadata and add SessionEnd/context-limit behavior, while CUEstrap models only PreToolUse and PostToolUse.
evidence: cuestrap contracts.cue: PreToolUse and PostToolUse only
critical.localContractImpact: Requalify supported events, common identity fields, session-end reduction, and context-spill behavior.

critical.title: Permission, approval, and sandbox contracts changed
critical.summary: Approval responses and permission world-state paths changed against CUEstrap's fixed permission vocabulary and fail-closed policy.
critical.localContractImpact: Requalify permission vocabulary, approval projection, and sandbox admission independently for both channels.

critical.title: Instruction, skill, and context policy changed
critical.summary: AGENTS processing, environment-scoped skill loading, collaboration state, and realtime delegation changed.
critical.localContractImpact: Requalify instruction loading, phase isolation, skill selection, and collaboration/realtime context boundaries.

critical.title: Tool dispatch and MCP routing changed
critical.summary: MCP connection management, dynamic tools, code-mode values, and main thread-scoped MCP refresh changed against CUEstrap's closed target routing.
critical.localContractImpact: Requalify tool classification, target routing, MCP refresh, and pending-operation correlation.

high.title: Result, context, thread, and workbook projections changed
high.summary: Dynamic results, additional-context limits, thread/turn history, app projections, connectors, MCP resources, and code-mode services changed.
high.localContractImpact: Update result normalization, context sizing, replay identity, and workbook MCP/code-mode qualification.

notes.title: Multi-agent ownership remains an explicit boundary
notes.summary: Agent spawning, role, notification, and realtime delegation changed while CUEstrap still binds one supervisory session/run/attempt and has no cross-agent ownership protocol.
notes.localContractImpact: Keep cross-agent ownership, delegated approvals, and attempt correlation unsupported until a separate contract is designed.

notes.title: Main and alpha qualification baselines diverged
notes.summary: Main advanced 161 commits from its prior CUEstrap baseline; latest-alpha-cli diverged 150 commits ahead and one behind and now declares 0.145.0-alpha.29.
notes.localContractImpact: Preserve separate support claims, fixtures, and qualification evidence for main and latest-alpha-cli.
